landing.pageTitle: Israeli Whist - Card Game Score Tracker | Play Online
landing.metaDescription: Track your Israeli Whist card game scores online. Free digital scorekeeper for the popular 4-player trick-taking game with trump bidding and contracts. Real-time scoring and game history.

hero.description: The iconic Israeli card game where every player fights for themselves. Bid your contract, choose the trump, and prove your strategy at the table.

table.title: The Table
table.subtitle: Where Strategy Meets Nerve
table.dealerDesc: Players bid to set the trump suit. The highest bidder commits to a minimum number of tricks.
table.fourPlayersDesc: Every player for themselves. 13 cards each. Read your opponents, protect your contract, and play every card with purpose.
table.trickTakingDesc: Each player declares how many tricks they'll take. Hit your number exactly — no more, no less.

ledger.title: The Ledger
ledger.subtitle: A Record of Eminence
ledger.description: Every round is tracked in the Ledger. Watch the scores shift as contracts are made and broken across rounds.

rules.dealText: All 52 cards are dealt to four players (13 each). The player left of the dealer opens a trump auction — bid a number of tricks (minimum 5) with a suit, or pass. Highest bid sets the trump. If no one bids, a Frisch round begins: players exchange 3 cards and bid again with a higher minimum.
rules.playText: After trump is set, each player declares how many tricks they will take. The total cannot equal 13 — the last bidder must push the game Over or Under. Players then lead tricks, must follow suit, and may cut with trump when void. The trick winner leads next.
rules.scoreText: Hit your contract exactly and score your tricks squared plus ten (e.g. bid 3, take 3 = 19 points). Miss your contract and lose points for every trick you're off. Bidding zero is high-risk: succeed for a 50-point bonus in Under, but fail and face a steep 50-point penalty.

cta.title: Ready to take your seat?
cta.description: The table is set. Four players, one deck, and the sharpest card game to come out of Israel.

tooltips.scoreExplain: Hit your bid exactly: tricks² + 10 points. Miss and lose points per trick off.
tooltips.bidZeroRisk: Bid 0 is high-risk: +50 if you take nothing, -50 if you take any trick.
tooltips.totalBidsBar: Total bids can't equal 13. Last bidder must push Over or Under.
tooltips.trumpExplain: The trump suit beats all other suits. Choose wisely to control the game.
tooltips.noTrumpExplain: No trump means the highest card of the led suit wins each trick.
tooltips.tricksCount: Record exactly how many tricks each player actually took this round.
tooltips.lockBid: Lock your bid so other players can see it. You can't change it after.
tooltips.resetVote: All players must vote yes to reset. Scores will go back to zero.
tooltips.roundScore: This round's score change based on bid vs actual tricks taken.
tooltips.managerBadge: The game manager can edit all players and manage the game.
tooltips.youBadge: This is your seat at the table.
tooltips.overMode: Over: total bids exceed 13. More competition for tricks.
tooltips.underMode: Under: total bids under 13. Someone won't hit their target.
tooltips.scorePositive: Ahead of the pack! Keep hitting those contracts.
tooltips.scoreNegative: Behind on points. A good zero-bid can turn things around.
tooltips.roundHistory: View the complete history of bids, tricks, and scores for every round.
tooltips.deleteGame: Permanently delete this game and all its history. This cannot be undone.
